reviews.review_title: Fun game - remember to set up your room
reviews.review_description:
It's a fun game, you feel like you are the GorrilaZilla itself and start to interact with the building in your room. It is especially designed for this XR learning purpose, go check out the corresponding tutorial on Udemy:  search course on Udemy
"Build Your MR Game & Publish it on Meta's Horizon Store".

Just a reminder that you need to have your room scan before playing this game, otherwise the building will be spawned out of your room space.

In todayέΑβs age of $80 video games the fact that we get a game this great for free is pretty amazing. Obviously itέΑβs not perfect but for free I canέΑβt ask her anymore. I appreciate the developers. Keep up the good work. Ύ┐╝

Gorilla Zilla is a super fun game if you know how to get it to work. I looked at all the reviews and they were complaining about how it doesn't spawn anything or that the hand tracking was bad. In this review, I will give my thoughts for the game and I will also explain how to get it to work.

1. The main problem people have with the game is how things won't spawn. The reason they don't spawn is because you most likely don't have a virtual space set up. In order to set this up you first have to go to the settings for your quest. I have a quest 3S, so it might not be exactly the same, but I used to have a quest 2 so I sort of get it. Once you are in the settings, you have to scroll down until you see a thing called "Environment Setup." Once you see that, click on it and then click the thing called "Space Setup." After that you just have to create a play some of the desired size. Once you're done with that, you can go into gorilla Zilla and click the start button. Now you can enjoy playing this super funny and goofy game!

2. In order to play the game, you have to have hand tracking enabled. Go to settings and then enable hand tracking. Once you have done that, you have to go into the game and set your controllers down the right way. If you have a quest two, you have to set the controllers down with the ring on the ground. If you have a quest three, you just place them in different ways until you have hand tracking. Then you go into the game and click start and enjoy playing your game.

Now that I have told you how to enable it, I want to tell you how fun it is. It is a really fun game where you are basically a big king long smashing buildings and trying not to get wuot by turrets. Overall, it is a really goofy game that I would recommend to all vr users!

Swatting helicopters and shells out of the air is incredibly entertaining, and it never gets old. But beyond the fun factor, the game truly shines in showcasing a bunch of impressive new mixed reality features. The developers did a fantastic job, and I love that they've included an attached course to teach people how to create their own version of the game. This is a must-play for anyone interested in mixed reality

reviews.review_title: Roarrr! Very nice tech demo and course!
reviews.review_description:
This is one of the first demos that have used various Quest 3 features. It also teaches you how to build the game on Unity for free!
